'''kahuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jibboom|jibboom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jibboom|jibboom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kahuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæhiyith|kæhiyith]] || [[word:kæhiyij|kæhiyij]] || [[word:kæhiyish|kæhiyish]] || [[word:kæhiyi|kæhiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kahuhuyuth|kahuhuyuth]] || [[word:kahuhuyuj|kahuhuyuj]] || [[word:kahuhuyush|kahuhuyush]] || [[word:kahuhuyu|kahuhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kahuyuth|kahuyuth]] || [[word:kahuyuj|kahuyuj]] || [[word:kahuyush|kahuyush]] || [[word:kahuyu|kahuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kahufyuth|kahufyuth]] || [[word:kahufyuj|kahufyuj]] || [[word:kahufyush|kahufyush]] || [[word:kahufyuf|kahufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kahuyuthu|kahuyuthu]] || [[word:kahuyuju|kahuyuju]] || [[word:kahuyushu|kahuyushu]] || [[word:kahuyuku|kahuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kahuyuth|kahuyuth]] || [[word:kahuyuj|kahuyuj]] || [[word:kahuyush|kahuyush]] || [[word:kahuyu|kahuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kahuyuthul|kahuyuthul]] || [[word:kahuyujul|kahuyujul]] || [[word:kahuyushul|kahuyushul]] || [[word:kahuyukul|kahuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kahuyuthuthu|kahuyuthuthu]] || [[word:kahuyujuju|kahuyujuju]] || [[word:kahuyushushu|kahuyushushu]] || [[word:kahuyuku|kahuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kahuyuthun|kahuyuthun]] || [[word:kahuyujun|kahuyujun]] || [[word:kahuyushun|kahuyushun]] || [[word:kahuyukun|kahuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kahuyuthuoro|kahuyuthuoro]] || [[word:kahuyujuoro|kahuyujuoro]] || [[word:kahuyushuoro|kahuyushuoro]] || [[word:kahuyukuoro|kahuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
